examples: In our times, human shrewdness has mastered the deep mysteries of the earth at a level far beyond the capacities of earlier peoples.
You underestimate his endurance, and I his shrewdness.
While the sacking of Mark Hughes was ruthless, it appeared to have an icy shrewdness.
Everyone rushes into them, so the price rises sharply and investors pat themselves on the back for their shrewdness.
While the world's best adventure racers tend to be in outstanding physical shape, it's their guile and shrewdness that win the race.
